title: Where can I get Tsubasa o Kudasai sheet music
display_title: Where can I get Tsubasa o Kudasai sheet music
wikitext:
[]: Where can I get Tsubasa o Kudasai sheet music?             Quote Post by shinji kun » Mon Apr 25, 2011 9:39 am I want to play Tsubasa o Kudasai on organ/piano but I don't know where I can get it. Do you know where? Thanks

[]: Re: Where can I get Tsubasa o Kudasai sheet music?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 25, 2011 10:37 am Shinji kun wrote: I want to play Tsubasa o Kudasai on organ/piano but I don't know where I can get it. Do you know where? Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 8:16 pm josh's site is somewhat hard to navigate in a roundabout way, so here's a more direct link to a relatively simple transcription of the arrangement found in the movie: http://mikuru.tw/wordpress/archives/1887

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 25, 2011 8:23 pm evaunit13 wrote: josh's site is somewhat hard to navigate in a roundabout way

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Apr 25, 2011 8:57 pm Yes, it is. You need an IQ of 160. Eva Monkey is the smartest man alive.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 25, 2011 9:52 pm Stryker wrote: Eva Monkey is the smartest man alive.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji kun » Mon Apr 25, 2011 10:11 pm Thanks for all ^^

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Tue Apr 26, 2011 5:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Is it really so hard to type "tsubasa o kudasai" into the search field on the site and then click on the first result?
